title: Verify Engagement section shows similar genre content after consumption 90
description: Test that for users who have consumed 90% or more of their acquired content, the Engagement section shows top 1 content in similar genre

steps.description: 1. Login with user who has consumed 90%+ of acquired content

expected_result: Engagement section displays top 1 content in similar genre to acquired content, with trailer auto-play if not started
